languages.text: {n}Сержант-инструктор Данкош кивает вам в знак приветствия.{/n} "Ваша Светлость! Стоило, конечно, затеять драку с железными уродами, чтобы сразиться бок о бок с вами!"
{n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh greets you with a nod.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It was well worth starting a fight with those iron bastards, just to get a chance to fight by your side!"
languages.original_text: {n}Сержант-инструктор Данкош кивает вам в знак приветствия.{/n} "Ваша Светлость! Стоило, конечно, затеять драку с железными уродами, чтобы сразиться бок о бок с вами!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh greets you with a nod.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It was well worth starting a fight with those iron bastards, just to get a chance of fighting by your side!"
{n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh greets you with a nod.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It was well worth starting a fight with those iron bastards, just to get a chance of fighting by your side!"
{n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh greets you with a nod.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It was well worth starting a fight with those iron bastards, just to get a chance to fight by your side!"
{n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh greets you with a nod.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It was well worth starting a fight with those iron bastards, just to get a chance to fight by your side!"

languages.text: {n}操练军士丹科什向你点头致意。{/n}“大人！只要能有机会在您身边作战，惹上那些铁杂种也值了!”
languages.original_text: {n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh greets you with a nod.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It was well worth starting a fight with those iron bastards, just to get a chance to fight by your side!"

traits.locale_text: {n}操练军士丹科什向你点头致意。{/n}“大人！只要能有机会在您身边作战，惹上那些铁杂种也值了!”

languages.text: {n}Talim Çavuşu Dankosh, başıyla selam veriyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Sırf sizin yanınızda savaşma şansı elde etmek için o demir piçlerle çatışmaya değerdi!"
languages.original_text: {n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh greets you with a nod.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It was well worth starting a fight with those iron bastards, just to get a chance to fight by your side!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Talim Çavuşu Dankosh, başıyla selam veriyor.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri! Sırf sizin yanınızda savaşma şansı elde etmek için o demir piçlerle çatışmaya değerdi!"

languages.text: {n}Le sergent-instructeur Dankosh vous salue d'un signe de tête.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie ! Ça valait la peine de chercher la bagarre à ces vermines de fer, rien que pour avoir l'occasion de me battre à vos côtés ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh greets you with a nod.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It was well worth starting a fight with those iron bastards, just to get a chance to fight by your side!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Le sergent-instructeur Dankosh vous salue d'un signe de tête.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie ! Ça valait la peine de chercher la bagarre à ces vermines de fer, rien que pour avoir l'occasion de me battre à vos côtés ! »

languages.text: {n}El sargento de instrucción Dankosh te saluda con un movimiento de cabeza.{/n} «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! ¡Ha merecido la pena meternos con esos cabrones de hierro solo por la oportunidad de luchar a su lado!».
languages.original_text: {n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh greets you with a nod.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It was well worth starting a fight with those iron bastards, just to get a chance to fight by your side!"

traits.locale_text: {n}El sargento de instrucción Dankosh te saluda con un movimiento de cabeza.{/n} «¡Mi{mf|lord|lady}! ¡Ha merecido la pena meternos con esos cabrones de hierro solo por la oportunidad de luchar a su lado!».

languages.text: {n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh begrüßt dich mit einem Nicken.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Es hat sich gelohnt, einen Kampf mit diesen eisernen Bastarden zu beginnen, wenn wir dafür die Chance haben, an Eurer Seite zu kämpfen!"
languages.original_text: {n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh greets you with a nod.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It was well worth starting a fight with those iron bastards, just to get a chance to fight by your side!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh begrüßt dich mit einem Nicken.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}! Es hat sich gelohnt, einen Kampf mit diesen eisernen Bastarden zu beginnen, wenn wir dafür die Chance haben, an Eurer Seite zu kämpfen!"

languages.text: {n}ダンコシュ軍曹が首を振って挨拶する。{/n}「{mf|閣下|閣下}！鉄のくせ者どもと戦って、貴様らと戦うチャンスを得るために戦った甲斐があった！」
languages.original_text: {n}Drill Sergeant Dankosh greets you with a nod.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}! It was well worth starting a fight with those iron bastards, just to get a chance to fight by your side!"

traits.locale_text: {n}ダンコシュ軍曹が首を振って挨拶する。{/n}「{mf|閣下|閣下}！鉄のくせ者どもと戦って、貴様らと戦うチャンスを得るために戦った甲斐があった！」
